variants: Baptiste Garrel was born at Fernwillow Estate, where his curiosity for science blossomed in his early years. He now resides in Everbrook Hollow, where he continues his work in innovative technology. Baptiste authored the 'Underwood Search Array,' a device that has garnered significant attention in his field. For his contributions, he received the prestigious Gemstone Pavilion Distinction, solidifying his reputation as a leading thinker. Outside of his professional endeavors, he is also a member of the Aurora Marble Collectors, sharing his passion for collecting rare marbles with fellow enthusiasts.
